name: BB:UBA : Unusual Times, Overnight
conditions_text: when the flow(s) or event(s) occur after 00:00
when the flow(s) or event(s) occur before 07:00
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Unusual Times, Overnight on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow(s) or event(s) occur after 00:00
AND when the flow(s) or event(s) occur before 07:00
